title: PhenologyRecipe
description:
A SEPAL Phenology recipe. Extracts seasonal vegetation-cycle metrics — start/end of season, peak greenness, amplitude, growing-season length — from a multi-year time series of a vegetation index.

**Bands produced.** Summary: `background`, `amplitude`, `median`. Per-detected-season (1, 2): `dayOfYear_<n>`, `days_<n>`, `median_<n>`, `slope_<n>`, `offset_<n>`. Monthly aggregates: one band per month (january..december).

**Pipeline.** (1) Build a time series of the configured `sources.band` (typically `evi` or `ndvi`) across the years `dates.fromYear..toYear`. (2) Fit a per-pixel seasonal model. (3) Extract phenology metrics.

options.title: PhenologyOptions
options.description: Processing options — union of optical / radar / Planet defaults. Same shape as `TIME_SERIES.options` — see that schema for full per-field documentation. The applicable subset depends on which `sources.dataSets` groups are selected.

dates.title: PhenologyDates
dates.description: Calendar-year range. Both endpoints are inclusive (`fromYear` and `toYear` ARE both included). The recipe analyzes the seasonal cycle across each year separately.

band.description: Vegetation index band to analyze. Common: `evi`, `evi2`, `ndvi`, `ndmi`, `nbr`, `savi`, `kndvi`.
